title: everardia montana subsp. guaiquinimae
intro: Everardia montana subsp. guaiquinimae is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Zingiberaceae, native to Venezuela. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Everardia montana subsp. guaiquinimae include the potential treatment of fever, respiratory issues, and digestive problems. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve boiling or infusing the rhizomes or leaves in hot water to create a tea or decoction for medicinal use.
